title: 17 Ideal Pre-Crash Recovery December Divi-Dogs
text: September-October, 2023, Barron's, Bloomberg, and Fortune analysts and reporters combined to list five sets of stocks sorted as “Recovery Bets.” Those five articles revealed 53 equities, with 42 paying-dividends. These recovery lists focus on financial services, healthcare, and real estate sectors by Barron's along with selected “change the world” stocks from Fortune and ten to watch from Bloomberg.

title: Is it Wise to Retain Host Hotels (HST) Stock in Your Portfolio?
text: Strong Sunbelt exposure and capital-recycling efforts are likely to support Host Hotels (HST). However, constrained business transient and group travel demand and high interest rates are concerning.

title: Host Hotels (HST) Gains 12.6% in 3 Months: Will the Trend Last?
text: Recovery in group and business transient travel demand, and capital-recycling moves are likely to aid Host Hotels' (HST) performance in the quarters ahead. Yet, macroeconomic uncertainty is a key woe.

title: 7 Dividend Stocks to Avoid in Your Retirement Portfolio
text: Amid soaring inflation, interest rates have also surged. Fixed income options such as certificates of deposit are paying the highest interest rates that they've offered in more than a decade.

title: Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (HST) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ:HST ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call November 2, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Jaime Marcus - Senior Vice President, Investor Relations Jim Risoleo - President & Chief Executive Officer Sourav Ghosh - Executive Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Aryeh Klein - BMO Michael Bellisario - Baird Bill Crow - Raymond James Duane Pfennigwerth - Evercore ISI Jay Kornreich - Wedbush Smedes Rose - Citi Dori Kesten - Wells Fargo Meredith Jensen - HSBC Tyler Batory - Oppenheimer Anthony Powell - Barclays Chris Woronka - Deutsche Bank Jaime Marcus Thank you and good morning. Before we begin, please note that many of the comments made today are considered to be forward-looking statements under federal securities laws as described in our filings with the SEC.

title: Host Hotels & Resorts Provides Updated Third Quarter 2023 Investor Presentation
text: BETHESDA, Md., Nov. 02, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST) (the “Company”), the nation's largest lodging real estate investment trust, today provided an updated investor presentation for third quarter 2023 results. The investor presentation can be found on the Investor Relations section on the Company's website at https://www.hosthotels.com/#key-investors-materials.

title: Host Hotels' (HST) Q3 FFO Tops, Occupancy Up, '23 View Raised
text: Host Hotels (HST) posts better-than-expected Q3 results on higher revenues aided by occupancy growth and improvements in group business. It also raises its 2023 AFFO per share outlook.

title: Here's What Key Metrics Tell Us About Host Hotels (HST) Q3 Earnings
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Host Hotels (HST) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Buy and Hold These 3 High-Yielding Dividend Stocks for Long-Term Gains
text: I read a recent Barron's article about some of the reasons high-yielding dividend stocks could rebound.  Barron's noted BMO Chief Investment Strategist Brian Belski comments that there's been indiscriminate selling of high-yield dividend stocks by investors.

title: Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. Reports Third Quarter 2023 Results
text: Maintains Midpoint of Full Year RevPAR Growth Guidance Repurchases $100 Million of Common Shares in Quarter Announces Hyatt Transformational Capital Program
